title: gongora armeniaca subsp. cornuta
intro: Gongora armeniaca subsp. cornuta, commonly known as the 'Cornutum' orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Gongora armeniaca subsp. cornuta include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
